name: Gmail
description: Read, search, and send emails through your Gmail account
description_zh: 通过 Gmail 账户读取、搜索和发送邮件

mcp_config.name: gmail
mcp_config.description: Gmail - read, search, draft, send emails

auth.help_text: Create OAuth 2.0 credentials in Google Cloud Console with Gmail API enabled
auth.help_text_zh: 在 Google Cloud Console 创建 OAuth 2.0 凭据并启用 Gmail API

name: Slack
description: Access Slack channels, messages, and workspace information
description_zh: 访问 Slack 频道、消息和工作区信息

mcp_config.name: slack
mcp_config.description: Slack - channels, messages, users, reactions, threads

auth.help_text: Create a Slack App, install to workspace, and copy the Bot User OAuth Token
auth.help_text_zh: 创建 Slack App，安装到工作区，复制 Bot User OAuth Token

name: Feishu / Lark
description: Messaging, group chats, documents, calendars, and more via Feishu/Lark OpenAPI
description_zh: 通过飞书开放平台实现消息、群聊、文档、日历等自动化操作

mcp_config.name: lark-mcp
mcp_config.description: Feishu/Lark - messaging, group chats, docs, calendar, contacts

auth.help_text: Create an app in Feishu Open Platform and copy App ID & App Secret. For user-identity APIs, run 'npx @larksuiteoapi/lark-mcp login' locally and add --oauth --token-mode user_access_token to MCP config.
auth.help_text_zh: 在飞书开放平台创建应用，复制 App ID 和 App Secret。如需以用户身份调用 API，请在本地运行 npx @larksuiteoapi/lark-mcp login 并在 MCP 配置中添加 --oauth --token-mode user_access_token。

name: DingTalk
description: Contacts, robot messaging, calendar, to-do, attendance, and more via DingTalk OpenAPI
description_zh: 通过钉钉开放平台实现通讯录、机器人消息、日历、待办、考勤等自动化操作

mcp_config.name: dingtalk-mcp
mcp_config.description: DingTalk - contacts, robot messaging, calendar, tasks, attendance

auth.help_text: Create an app in DingTalk Open Platform Developer Console, copy Client ID and Client Secret
auth.help_text_zh: 在钉钉开放平台开发者后台创建应用，复制 Client ID 和 Client Secret

name: QQ Mail
description: Send and receive emails through your QQ Mail account via IMAP/SMTP
description_zh: 通过 IMAP/SMTP 协议收发 QQ 邮箱邮件

mcp_config.name: qq-mail
mcp_config.description: QQ Mail - send, receive, search emails via IMAP/SMTP

auth.help_text: In QQ Mail Settings → Account, enable IMAP/SMTP service and generate an authorization code (not your QQ password)
auth.help_text_zh: 在 QQ 邮箱设置 → 账户中，开启 IMAP/SMTP 服务并生成授权码（非 QQ 登录密码）
